messages.content: You got something on your mind?
I counted on you to help my cause. You and that thug are obviously failing. Aren't we ever going on our date?

evidence: You got something on your mind?
Aren't we ever going on our date?

evidence: I counted on you to help my cause.

evidence: You and that thug are obviously failing.
